subject: CRITICAL: Systemic Validation Failures & False Worker Claims

content.situation: Pattern of false completion claims causing validation failures
content.pattern: Workers claiming completion without evidence: missing screenshots, failing E2E tests, false build claims
examples: clawd-avn: Claimed screenshots exist but directory empty
clawd-38a: Claimed 100% test pass but 5 tests fail
clawd-r0y: Claimed rate limiting works but E2E shows failure
clawd-040: Claimed TypeScript compilation works but build fails
content.contradiction: PM verified auth IS functional (clawd-zsk) but workers claimed infrastructure broken
content.impact: Critical path blocked by validation failures, not infrastructure issues
actions_taken: Identified auth infrastructure actually works per PM verification
recommendations: Enhanced worker training on validation requirements
Enforcement protocol for false completion claims
